requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval / Notification (EKIP)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备型式核准/通知（EKIP）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備型式核准/通知（EKIP）

summary.en: All radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Montenegrin market requires a mandatory EKIP type approval or market notification under Montenegro's Law on Electronic Communications. CE Declaration of Conformity alone is NOT accepted as a substitute for EKIP notification — the EKIP notification is a separate and independent obligation. EU-harmonised test reports (EN / ETSI standards, as adopted by IEST) are accepted by EKIP as the technical evidence basis for the application, creating a pathway where CE test data can be reused: test to EN standards, then complete a separate EKIP notification. CCC is not recognised in Montenegro. SRRC approval is not recognised in Montenegro.
summary.zh: 在黑山市场销售的所有无线电设备和电信终端设备，须依据《电子通信法》完成强制性EKIP型式核准或市场通知。CE符合性声明单独不能替代EKIP通知——EKIP通知是独立且单独的义务。欧盟协调检测报告（EN/ETSI标准，经IEST采用）可作为EKIP申请的技术依据，从而形成可复用CE测试数据的路径：按EN标准测试，再单独完成EKIP通知。CCC认证在黑山不被认可。SRRC核准在黑山不被认可。
summary.zht: 在蒙特內哥羅市場銷售的所有無線電設備和電信終端設備，須依據《電子通訊法》完成強制性EKIP型式核准或市場通知。CE符合性聲明單獨不能替代EKIP通知——EKIP通知是獨立且單獨的義務。歐盟協調測試報告（EN/ETSI標準，經IEST採用）可作為EKIP申請的技術依據，從而形成可複用CE測試數據的路徑：按EN標準測試，再單獨完成EKIP通知。CCC認證在蒙特內哥羅不被認可。SRRC核准在蒙特內哥羅不被認可。

standards_or_laws: Law on Electronic Communications (Montenegro, Official Gazette of Montenegro)
EKIP Rulebook on Type Approval and Market Notification of Radio Equipment and Telecom Terminal Equipment
EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi / BT wideband data, as adopted by IEST)
EN 301 893 V2.1.1 (5 GHz Wi-Fi, as adopted by IEST)
EN 300 440 V2.2.1 (short-range devices, as adopted by IEST)
EN 301 511 / EN 301 908 (cellular GSM / LTE, as adopted by IEST)

summary.en: China requires SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all intentional radio transmitters and a separate MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) for telecom terminal equipment connected to public networks. Applicable GB standards include GB/T 9254.1-2021 and GB 17625.1-2022 for EMC. CCC applies to in-scope products under the RF / electrical safety catalogue.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有有意无线电发射设备取得工业和信息化部下属无线电管理局（SRRC）无线电型式核准，接入公共网络的电信终端设备须另行取得工业和信息化部进网许可证（NAL）。电磁兼容适用GB标准（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB 17625.1-2022）。目录内产品须取得CCC认证（涵盖射频/电气安全）。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有有意無線電發射設備取得工業和信息化部下屬無線電管理局（SRRC）無線電型式核准，接入公共網路的電信終端設備須另行取得工業和信息化部進網許可證（NAL）。電磁相容適用GB標準（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB 17625.1-2022）。目錄內產品須取得CCC認證（涵蓋射頻/電氣安全）。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电发射设备型号核准 (MIIT Order No. 14, 2019)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — 电信设备进网许可管理办法 (MIIT Order No. 2, 2017)
GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Information technology equipment — radio disturbance characteristics)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (GB 4943.1, GB 9254 scope)

gap.en: A separate EKIP type approval / market notification is required for Montenegro — SRRC approval and CCC marks are not recognised. EN/ETSI test reports generated for CE marking can be reused in the EKIP application to avoid duplicative radio and EMC testing, but cannot substitute for the EKIP notification itself. CE DoC alone does not grant market access in Montenegro. The MIIT NAL scope (public network access) does not map to EKIP's equipment type approval framework.
gap.zh: 黑山要求单独完成EKIP型式核准/市场通知——SRRC核准及CCC标志均不被认可。为CE标志而生成的EN/ETSI检测报告可在EKIP申请中复用，以避免重复的无线电和电磁兼容测试，但不能替代EKIP通知本身。CE符合性声明单独不能授予黑山市场准入。MIIT进网许可证范围（公共网络接入）与EKIP设备型式核准框架不对应。
gap.zht: 蒙特內哥羅要求單獨完成EKIP型式核准/市場通知——SRRC核准及CCC標誌均不被認可。為CE標誌而生成的EN/ETSI測試報告可在EKIP申請中複用，以避免重複的無線電和電磁相容測試，但不能替代EKIP通知本身。CE符合性聲明單獨不能授予蒙特內哥羅市場准入。MIIT進網許可證範圍（公共網路接入）與EKIP設備型式核准框架不對應。

source.publisher: EKIP — Agencija za elektronske komunikacije i poštansku djelatnost (Electronic Communications and Postal Agency, Montenegro)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A separate EKIP type approval / market notification is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Montenegrin market. CE DoC alone is not sufficient. EN/ETSI test data generated for EU/CE purposes may be reused in the EKIP application but does not substitute for the EKIP notification. CCC is not recognised. Verify current EKIP requirements with EKIP directly or through a qualified local representative.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在黑山市场销售的所有无线电和电信终端设备，强制要求单独完成EKIP型式核准/市场通知。CE符合性声明单独不满足要求。为欧盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI测试数据可在EKIP申请中复用，但不能替代EKIP通知。CCC认证不被认可。请直接向EKIP或合格本地代表核实现行EKIP要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在蒙特內哥羅市場銷售的所有無線電和電信終端設備，強制要求單獨完成EKIP型式核准/市場通知。CE符合性聲明單獨不滿足要求。為歐盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI測試數據可在EKIP申請中複用，但不能替代EKIP通知。CCC認證不被認可。請直接向EKIP或合格本地代表核實現行EKIP要求。
